---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Your Name Here"
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: yes
    mode: selfcontained
  pdf_document:
date: "2024-09-18"
---

Setup the RMarkdown file.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# install.packages("devtools")
library(devtools)
```

Next, we're going to load other packages and libraries.

```{r, include=F}
# install.packages("tidyverse", repos = "http://cran.us.r-project.org")
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

here::i_am("lab1.Rmd")
```

```{r}
remotes::install_github("professornaite/critstats", force=TRUE)
library(critstats)
```

```{r}
??critstats

```
